task: Dispatch mutations emit spine events via emitDispatchSpineEvent helper calling events.log_event(). Covers: load.created, load.status_changed, load.chargeback_flagged, load.cancelled, load.cancellation_approved, load.assigned_to_driver, load.quicksave_draft_completed.
details: New helper: dispatch-spine-emit.ts — wraps events.log_event() for all dispatch event types.
verify-a2-audit-emit-dispatch.mjs: guards helper calls log_event, no raw INSERT bypass, all event types present in union.
